serviceCats.name: Signature Therapy Treatments
serviceCats.tagline: Deeply healing massages that melt away tension from head to toe.

items.d: Firm, focused pressure to release chronic knots and muscle tension.
Long, flowing strokes that calm the nervous system and ease stress.
Aromatic oils and rhythmic kneading for whole-body restoration.
Classic Indian head, neck & shoulder massage with herbal oil.

serviceCats.name: Foot Spa & Pedicure
serviceCats.tagline: Restorative rituals for tired, hard-working feet.

items.d: Soak, scrub, shape and massage for refreshed, cared-for feet.
Detoxifying soak and mask that revives circulation and softness.
De-tan and brighten with a luminous finish for sandal-ready feet.
Pressure-point work that relaxes the whole body through the feet.
Exfoliating scrub that buffs away dullness for a healthy glow.
Targets uneven tone, leaving skin brighter and more even.
Nourishing wrap that deeply moisturises and softens skin.
A deep cleanse and polish for hard-to-reach back skin.

serviceCats.name: Facial & Clean-Up Treatments
serviceCats.tagline: Customised facials for a luminous, healthy complexion.

items.d: Cleanse, exfoliate, massage and mask for instant radiance.
Intense hydration to plump, soothe and revive dehydrated skin.
A quick refresh to deep-clean pores and brighten tired skin.
Firming actives that smooth fine lines and restore vitality.

services.title: Signature Therapy
services.desc: Deep tissue, Swedish, Balinese & aroma-relax massages by trained therapists.

services.title: Foot Spa & Pedicure
services.desc: Anti-oxidant, brightening & de-tanning rituals for tired, pampered feet.

services.title: Skin & Body Polishing
services.desc: Body polish & wraps that leave skin smooth, radiant and renewed.

services.title: Facial & Clean-Up
services.desc: Customised facials and clean-ups for a luminous, healthy glow.

franchiseWhy.title: A trusted, loved brand
franchiseWhy.desc: Step into a name synonymous with luxury, quality and exceptional service — already enjoying customer loyalty and credibility.

franchiseWhy.title: End-to-end training
franchiseWhy.desc: Extensive training across treatments, customer service, business management and marketing for you and your team.

franchiseWhy.title: Proven, profitable model
franchiseWhy.desc: Unit economics refined across 50+ spas. A booming wellness market and strong, repeatable returns.

franchiseWhy.title: Site selection & design
franchiseWhy.desc: We help you choose a high-footfall location and deliver a turnkey boutique spa fit-out.

franchiseWhy.title: Marketing that fills chairs
franchiseWhy.desc: National brand campaigns plus local activation, digital and reputation management on your behalf.

franchiseWhy.title: Backed by Impel Ventures
franchiseWhy.desc: The group behind Studio11, Impel Overseas, DentalOne & GaadiSaaf — a pioneer in Indian franchising.

franchiseSteps.title: Enquire
franchiseSteps.desc: Share your city and investment capacity. We send the franchise kit within 24 hours.

franchiseSteps.title: Evaluate
franchiseSteps.desc: Review unit economics with our team and finalise your location together.

franchiseSteps.title: Build
franchiseSteps.desc: We design, fit out and staff your spa while training your team to Isa standards.

franchiseSteps.title: Open
franchiseSteps.desc: Launch with a marketing blitz and ongoing operational support from day one.

hotelModels.title: We run it for you
hotelModels.desc: Isa designs, staffs and operates the spa entirely. You provide the space; we deliver the experience and a share of revenue.
hotelModels.best: Best for: hotels wanting zero operational involvement.

hotelModels.title: Partner & profit
hotelModels.desc: A collaborative model where investment and returns are shared, aligning both teams around guest satisfaction and growth.
hotelModels.best: Best for: properties seeking aligned, long-term upside.

hotelModels.title: Your team, our brand
hotelModels.desc: Operate under the Isa Spa name with our SOPs, training, product line and brand standards backing your in-house team.
hotelModels.best: Best for: groups with existing wellness operations.

hotelBenefits.title: Elevated guest experience
hotelBenefits.desc: A signature wellness amenity that lifts reviews, loyalty and average length of stay.

hotelBenefits.title: A new revenue stream
hotelBenefits.desc: Monetise underused space with treatments, memberships and retail — with minimal capex from you.

hotelBenefits.title: Trusted brand on your floor
hotelBenefits.desc: Borrow the equity of India’s most luxurious day spa chain to differentiate your property.

hotelBenefits.title: Zero operational burden
hotelBenefits.desc: We handle hiring, training, supplies, compliance and day-to-day management.

aboutValues.title: Reverence
aboutValues.desc: Every guest is treated with the grace their unique energy deserves.

aboutValues.title: Mastery
aboutValues.desc: Highly trained therapists and bespoke therapies, never one-size-fits-all.

aboutValues.title: Accessibility
aboutValues.desc: World-class spa experiences made an affordable luxury, in your neighbourhood.
